data.title: U.S. Commerce Secretary Rutnick: The Strait of Hormuz is open, and ships are passing through.
data.description: U.S. Commerce Secretary Rutnick stated that the Strait of Hormuz is open and ships are passing through. Iranian military officials stated that military vessels are not allowed to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. (Jinshi)

data.title: Yi Lihua: I remain optimistic about this rebound and there is no reason to take profits for the time being.
data.description: Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua posted on the X platform: "With the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, the war has officially ended. I still maintain that neither side has any reason to continue fighting. Peace is the only best option. I remain optimistic about this rebound. The S&P 500 has hit a new high. We continue to buy into our micro-strategy. Hawthorn Coin is taking turns performing. There is no reason to take profits for now."

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 77,000 USDT with a 3.65% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 17, 2026, 13:51 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 77,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 77,061.898438 USDT, with a narrowed 3.65% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Aave V4 Active Loans Surpass $10 Million
data.description: Aave V4 has achieved a significant milestone with active loans exceeding $10 million, currently reported at $10.03 million. According to Foresight News, the total deposits have also surpassed $30 million, currently standing at $30.81 million.

data.title: Gold and silver prices rose across the board, while cryptocurrency volatility fell, with the EVIX dropping 4.68% intraday.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,851.67 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.27%. Silver prices rose to $81.817 per ounce, a daily increase of 4.34%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 43.09, a daily decrease of 3.21%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 63.71, a daily decrease of 4.68%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.11% to 6.81311. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.51% to 158.318. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 2.21% to 6,052.32 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.56% to 10,643.58 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 2.45% to 24,714.39 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 8.72% to $85.21 per barrel, while Brent crude oil fell 9.05% to $90.80 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Google's Earnings Call: Key Concerns Over AI Costs and Investments
data.description: Wall Street is closely monitoring two major concerns ahead of Google's earnings call on April 29, following a 23% rise in GOOG shares over the past two weeks. According to NS3.AI, the primary issues are the increased operating costs associated with AI search summaries and Alphabet's significant investment of $175 billion to $185 billion in AI data centers and chips.

data.title: Analysts: Iran's statement regarding the Strait of Hormuz did not provide clear information.
data.description: Shipping industry analysts say that while Iran's foreign minister announced on Friday that the Strait of Hormuz is "fully open" for vessels using Iranian-designated routes, this does not reassure the shipping industry that shipping activity through the strait can resume. Richard Meade, editor of Lloyd's Shipping Daily, stated, "From a shipping perspective, it's certainly promising, but at the moment it doesn't give anyone enough clear information to make any decisions." The Iranian foreign minister's statement did not explicitly address whether Iran still plans to charge tolls for passing vessels. (Jinshi)

data.title: Over the past hour, total liquidations across the entire network have increased to $200 million, with $101 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, the total liquidation amount across the network in the past hour has expanded to $200 million, including $174 million in short positions and $26.18 million in long positions. In addition, BTC liquidations reached $101 million and ETH liquidations reached $47.45 million.

data.title: Trump: The naval blockade against Iran will remain fully effective until the deal is 100% complete.
data.description: US President Trump: The Strait of Hormuz is fully open and ready for commercial activities and full passage, but the maritime blockade against Iran will remain fully effective until our transactions with Iran are 100% complete. US officials stated that the US military's blockade measures against Iran are still in effect. (Jinshi)

data.title: Expectations of a Federal Reserve rate cut are rising, with the probability of a June rate cut increasing to 7.1%.
data.description: According to CME's "FedWatch": The probability of the Fed raising interest rates by 25 basis points in April is 0.5%, and the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 99.5% (both unchanged from this morning). The probability of the Fed cutting rates by a cumulative 25 basis points by June is 7.1%, the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 92.4%, and the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate hike is 0.5% (this morning they were 1.4%, 98%, and 0.5%, respectively). The probability of the Fed cutting rates by a cumulative 25 basis points by July is 18.1%, the probability of keeping rates unchanged is 80.6%, and the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate hike is 0.4% (this morning they were 9.7%, 89.7%, and 0.5%, respectively).

data.title: Iran's Foreign Minister: Hormuz Strait to Open During Remaining Lebanon-Israel Ceasefire
data.description: U.S. stocks opened higher on April 17, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising 1.07%, the S&P 500 increasing 0.66%, and the Nasdaq Composite gaining 0.87%. According to Jin10, most U.S. oil and gas stocks declined, with BP dropping 6.3%, ExxonMobil falling 5.07%, and Chevron decreasing 3.7%. This follows an announcement by Iran's Foreign Minister that the Hormuz Strait will be open during the remaining time of the Lebanon-Israel ceasefire.

data.title: Hedera and Stellar Show Strong Performance
data.description:
Hedera (HBAR) has demonstrated notable growth alongside Stellar (XLM), marking a significant rise of 1.4% since Thursday. According to CoinDesk, this upward trend positions Hedera among the top performers in the cryptocurrency market, highlighting its potential for investors and enthusiasts alike. The increase in value reflects positive sentiment and interest in Hedera's capabilities and future prospects.

Stellar, known for its focus on facilitating cross-border transactions, also continues to perform well, contributing to its reputation as a reliable digital asset. The recent performance of both Hedera and Stellar underscores the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency landscape, where fluctuations and growth can occur rapidly. Investors are closely monitoring these developments, considering the implications for market strategies and investment opportunities. As the market evolves, the performance of these cryptocurrencies will be pivotal in shaping investor decisions and market trends.

data.title: The market capitalization of ASTEROID, a Meme coin on the Ethereum blockchain, has surpassed $30 million, setting a new record.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of the Ethereum blockchain's Meme coin ASTEROID has surged past $30 million, reaching a new high of $33.74 million, and is currently trading at $32.28 million. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks. Meme coins generally lack real-world applications and rely more on speculative hype; caution is advised when entering the market.

data.title: The market expects the likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut to increase in 2026.
data.description: U.S. short-term interest rate futures rose as the market anticipated a greater likelihood of a Federal Reserve rate cut in 2026. (Jinshi)

data.title: European Central Bank April Rate Hike Probability Reduced
data.description: The probability of the European Central Bank raising interest rates in April has been lowered by the money market from 15% earlier in the day to approximately 8%. According to Jin10, this adjustment reflects changing expectations in the financial markets regarding the ECB's monetary policy decisions.

data.title: Trump: Iran just announced that the "Iran Strait" is fully open and ready for full passage.
data.description: Trump stated that Iran has just announced that the "Iran Strait" is fully open and ready for full passage. (Jinshi)

data.title: Xinhua News Agency: The US and Iran are discussing plans to end the war.
data.description: According to US media reports on the 17th, citing two US officials and two sources familiar with the negotiations, the US and Iran are communicating on a plan aimed at ending the war. One key issue is that the US will unfreeze $20 billion in Iranian funds in exchange for Iran relinquishing its enriched uranium stockpile. The report also cited another source familiar with the mediation efforts as saying that the talks are expected to take place this Sunday in Islamabad, the capital of Pakistan. (Xinhua)

data.title: BAE Systems Poised to Surpass $100 Billion Market Value Amid Rising Defense Spending
data.description: BAE Systems is anticipated to reach a market value exceeding $100 billion for the first time, driven by heightened military expenditures from the United States and Gulf states following the Iran conflict. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the UK defense contractor's strategic advantage in the current geopolitical climate. Analysts suggest that the increased defense budgets in these regions are significantly contributing to BAE Systems' growth trajectory. The company's robust portfolio and strategic positioning in the defense sector are expected to sustain its upward momentum in the market.

data.title: Binance AI Pro Revolutionizes Trading with Advanced Automation
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, introducing Binance's AI Pro, a cutting-edge tool designed to streamline trading workflows by compressing the time from identifying opportunities to executing trades—from hours to mere minutes. This innovative system integrates five major AI models, Binance Skills, and a dedicated AI Pro account, making advanced trading processes more accessible to users.

The article highlights how Binance AI Pro is primarily used as an execution tool, with nearly 70% of AI actions focused on execution rather than analysis. Traditionally, even seasoned crypto traders had to navigate multiple steps, including market research, data comparison, strategy formulation, trade configuration, and post-execution monitoring. Binance AI Pro simplifies these layers, allowing users to articulate ideas in natural language, refine them, connect them to trading actions, and manage them within Binance. This approach shortens the gap between conceptualizing a market view and executing a trading strategy.

AI and automation are increasingly integral to financial platforms, and Binance AI Pro stands out by offering a comprehensive suite of functions within a single environment. Users can seamlessly transition from research and market monitoring to strategy setup and execution without needing to reconstruct workflows across various tools. The real value of AI in trading lies in enhancing the process—improving speed, structure, clarity, and reducing manual steps between spotting an opportunity and acting on it. Binance AI Pro is designed with these improvements in mind.

Launched in Beta in late March, Binance AI Pro is a one-stop AI agent built on the OpenClaw open-source ecosystem, accessible via Binance AI on the web and Android app. It integrates major AI models, including ChatGPT, Claude, Qwen, MiniMax, and Kimi, and connects them to Binance Skills in a single interface. The product assists users with tasks such as market analysis, asset monitoring, spot and perpetual contract orders, leveraged borrowing, and custom strategy execution, offering a more intuitive way to interact with trading tools.

The article emphasizes the execution-first behavior of Binance AI Pro, noting that 68.69% of tool calls were execution commands, and 35.2% of user intents focused on trade execution and strategy requests. This indicates that users are leveraging AI for operational execution rather than advisory purposes. The AI Pro Account is separate from a user's main Binance account, with an AI API key that has no withdrawal or transfer permissions, ensuring operational risks are minimized.

Binance AI Pro is part of Binance's broader automation stack, which covers all seven categories tracked by Binance Research, including copy trading, bot trading, chatbot, portfolio advisory, risk management, market signals, and fraud detection. This comprehensive approach positions Binance AI Pro as a timely and flexible tool for various users and goals, enhancing the trading experience by making it more conversational and easier to shape around user intentions. As always, users are advised to stay informed, use these tools responsibly, and make decisions with care.
